item.title: FAILED -- Mon Jul 13 18:00:32 UTC 2026
item.description:
FAILED 
Checker class biz.lermitage.sub.service.checker.impl.InkscapeChecker failed, ignoring
java.net.ConnectException: Connection timed out
	at java.base/sun.nio.ch.Net.connect0(Native Method)
	at java.base/sun.nio.ch.Net.connect(Net.java:601)
	at java.base/sun.nio.ch.Net.connect(Net.java:590)

	at java.base/java.net.URL.openStream(URL.java:1325)

	at org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.proceed(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:158)
